implementation_summary: Added isMigrationNoticeAcknowledged/acknowledgeMigrationNotice helpers to knownPeers.ts. Added AC-MIGRATE-1 through AC-MIGRATE-4 boot-time migration backfill effect to MarmotContext — runs before AC-EVER-4 maintenance and normal purge effects, seeds knownPeers from current group members, runs all four purge helpers, then marks migration complete. Created MigrationNoticeBanner component (AC-MIGRATE-5): shows dismissible i18n info banner on contacts page after migration, hides permanently after user clicks dismiss. Mounted banner at top of ContactListView.
